channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats Advocate for Affordable Housing, Yet Their Policies Hinder Construction
item.description: Strict environmental rules imposed by liberal leaders are obstructing new home development.

item.title: The Iranians Still Aren't Our Friends
item.description: Trump should not let his desire to exit the military conflict he started lead to unrealistic views about our longtime adversary.

item.title: A Novel Cure for the Self-Help Epidemic
item.description: Rather than seeking self-optimization, we should return to classic stories that nurture moral imagination.

item.title: Canada's Assisted-Suicide Boom Reveals the Human Costs of Single-Payer
item.description: When patients face long waits and limited options, euthanasia appears more like a policy response to a struggling healthcare system.
